signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: When we look at the macro category within North America, we do see that he is spending less in apparel in general.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We didn't use sale language. We led with an early access... did that at no incremental cost.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We remain prudent in our planning... being mindful of the macroeconomic environment as we move into the balance of Q4.
